creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Pedro, is distinfo complete?

> portlint
WARN: Makefile: USE_ANT is intended only for ports that build with Ant.  It is recommended not to override the default 'do-build:' target when defining USE_ANT
FATAL: /usr/home/marino/svnhub/freebsd-ports/textproc/apache-poi/distinfo: has no SIZE record for apache-poi/xmlbeans-2.6.0.jar.
FATAL: /usr/home/marino/svnhub/freebsd-ports/textproc/apache-poi/distinfo: no checksum record for apache-poi/xmlbeans-2.6.0.jar.
WARN: /usr/home/marino/svnhub/freebsd-ports/textproc/apache-poi/distinfo: no checksum records for all supported algorithms (SHA256) for apache-poi/xmlbeans-2.6.0.jar.
2 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.


It seems that xmlbeans entry is missing?
